name: Snow Pea & Pear Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yogurt, pineapple juice, and sugar in a bowl. Stir well and set aside.
2. Cook snow peas in a small amount of boiling water for 15 seconds. Drain well.
3. Cut the pear into half lengthwise, core, and cut lengthwise into thin slices.
4. Brush with lime juice.
5. Arrange snow peas and pears on each of 4 radicchio-lined salad plates.
6. Drizzle each with 1 1/2 tablespoons of yogurt mixture.
7. Sprinkle with green onions and walnuts.
